creator: kib@FreeBSD.org
text:
Trying to upgrade ruby 2.2.2 to 2.2.2_1, with EXAMPLES disabled in the config.

===>  Installing for ruby-2.2.2_1,1
===>   ruby-2.2.2_1,1 depends on package: libffi>=0 - found
===>   ruby-2.2.2_1,1 depends on package: libedit>=0 - found
===>   ruby-2.2.2_1,1 depends on shared library: libyaml.so - found (/usr/local/lib/libyaml.so)
===>   ruby-2.2.2_1,1 depends on shared library: libexecinfo.so - found (/usr/local/lib/libexecinfo.so)
===>   Registering installation for ruby-2.2.2_1,1
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/home/portworkdir32/usr/ports/lang/ruby22/work/stage/usr/local/share/examples/ruby22/curses/): No such file or directory
*** Error code 74

# This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
# Options for ruby-2.2.2_1,1
_OPTIONS_READ=ruby-2.2.2_1,1
_FILE_COMPLETE_OPTIONS_LIST=CAPIDOCS DEBUG DOCS EXAMPLES GMP RDOC LIBEDIT READLI
NE
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=CAPIDOCS
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=DEBUG
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=DOCS
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=EXAMPLES
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=GMP
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=RDOC
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=LIBEDIT
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=READLINE
